checks.name: npm run validate
checks.evidence: 40 node tests passed; MDE parser checked project JSON/JSONL files; traceability validator checked required IDs through GEN-020/SE-0004/ARCH-0.4-candidate/ADL-0004; fixture index check passed; fixture evaluation passed.

checks.name: node --test test/ltr.test.js
checks.evidence: LTR feature extraction, learned reranking behavior, query-fold cross-validation, and candidate-pool recall tests passed.

checks.name: npm run eval:cranfield:ltr -- --embeddings experiments/cranfield-v0/embeddings-ollama-llama31-8b-title-abstract-gen019.json
checks.evidence: evaluation-ltr-ollama-features-gen020.json records cross-validated nDCG@10 0.3164; evaluation-ltr-ollama-features-k20-binary-gen020.json records binary nDCG@20 0.4467.

checks.name: npm run eval:cranfield:ltr lexical feature ablation
checks.evidence: evaluation-ltr-lexical-features-gen020.json records cross-validated nDCG@10 0.3166; evaluation-ltr-lexical-features-k20-binary-gen020.json records binary nDCG@20 0.4529.

blocked_or_skipped.name: remote OpenSearch LTR plugin validation
blocked_or_skipped.reason: Deferred because offline cross-validated LTR did not beat refined PRF.

blocked_or_skipped.name: Cloudflare deploy verification
blocked_or_skipped.reason: No deployment was requested; GEN-020 leaves the public/default architecture unchanged.

high_findings.summary: ARCH-0.2-candidate refined prf-rerank remains candidate-only until BEIR transferability is measured.

medium_findings.summary: LTR in-sample gains exceed refined PRF but cross-validated metrics remain below refined PRF, so ARCH-0.4-candidate is not promoted.

evidence_quality: GEN-020 validates an offline LTR path and records that LTR has ranking signal but is not yet promotion-quality under query-grouped cross-validation.
